name: default
description: goon's default role-graph as editable stages: execute → reviewer (human approval) → on approve fan out to open_pr + notify; on reject loop back through rework. The reviewer is the only human gate (set auto_approve to skip it). Edit the prompts/tasks/wiring below to tune behaviour.

stages.name: review
stages.task: Review the executor's changes for {{.Key}} ({{.Title}}): correctness, regressions, missing edge cases.
